testsuite.name: purchase.currency

testcase.name: validationForCurrencyField
testcase.system-out: Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0). Provided: 500.0. Using safe fallback value. Generated First Name: johnfdb Generated Email: nairobiPalermo2fef4@gmail.com Currency: TestData → Status: 400 Response Body: { "message": "Currency TestData is Not Allowed", "code": "transaction_error" } PASS → Email rejected correctly as expected: TestData

testcase.name: setup
